title: GOOSE
description: you like chicken? what about angry chicken? I give you... GOOSE
body:
in this mod you can experience the real life fear of geese, now in Minecraft! these angry birds spawn almost everywhere trees grow and will attack you in sight if you get too close...

they drop goose Meat that must be cooked.

also enjoy the new painting variant!

1.20.1 support added!

Cold Goose variant, spawns in colder climates than the Common Goose.

The HONK Chicken from "Untitled Goose Game" has been added as a optional boss battle! simply summon it by clicking a Common/Cold Goose with an Iron Sword and let the battle commence!

**NEW**

1.20.2 support coming soon!
